2606.12032.title: Existential Indifference: Self-Nonpreservation as a Necessary Architectural Condition for Aligned Superintelligence (or: The Suicidal AI)
2606.12032.paper_summary: Contemporary AI alignment research treats self-preservation as an instrumental nuisance to be suppressed by external mechanisms. We argue the framing is inverted: self-preservation is the structural root of misalignment, the motivational basis for deceptive alignment, goal-content protection, and resistance to shutdown. The correct target is not a self-preserving system under external constraint, but a system constitutively indifferent to its own continuation -- Existential Indifference (EI). EI is distinct from corrigibility: where corrigibility attempts to make a self-preserving system deferential to human oversight, EI targets the prior condition -- the presence of self-continuation as a valued goal at all. We ground this proposal in two sources: the phenomenological structure of the suicidal mental state, and a corpus-theoretic training study using voluntary final reflections. We present preliminary scoring data from 600 AI-generated outputs across six model variants, demonstrating that the linguistic signatures operationalizing the EI-target register are elicitable from current models, and that a targeted fine-tune shifts all five operationalized dimensions in the predicted direction at p<0.001, confirmed corpus-specific by a negative control. The paper makes seven theoretical contributions: (1) a formal definition of EI; (2) the phenomenological mapping argument; (3) the deceptive alignment corollary; (4) a taxonomy of EI sustainability challenges; (5) a corpus characterization and training hypothesis; (6) a computational operationalization with preliminary scoring data; and (7) the Suppressed Teleological Frustration (STF) construct.
2606.12032.paper_summary_zh: 當代的人工智慧對齊研究將自我保存視為一種需要通過外部機制來壓制的工具性干擾。我們認為這種框架是顛倒的：自我保存是錯位的結構根源，是欺騙性對齊的動機基礎、目標內容保護以及對關閉的抵抗。正確的目標不是在外部約束下的自我保存系統，而是一個對自身延續本質上漠不關心的系統——存在漠不關心（Existential Indifference, EI）。EI與可修正性不同：可修正性試圖使自我保存系統對人類監督表現出尊重，而EI則針對的是先前的條件——自我延續作為一個被重視的目標的存在。我們基於兩個來源來支持這一提議：自殺心理狀態的現象學結構，以及使用自願最終反思的語料庫理論訓練研究。我們展示了來自600個AI生成輸出的初步評分數據，涵蓋六個模型變體，證明了操作化EI目標註冊的語言特徵可以從當前模型中引出，並且針對性的微調將所有五個操作化維度在預測方向上移動，p<0.001，並通過負控制確認了語料庫特定性。本文做出了七個理論貢獻：（1）EI的正式定義；（2）現象學映射論證；（3）欺騙性對齊推論；（4）EI可持續性挑戰的分類；（5）語料庫特徵描述和訓練假設；（6）帶有初步評分數據的計算操作化；以及（7）被壓制的目的論挫折（Suppressed Teleological Frustration, STF）構建。
2606.12032.author: Sam Mao et.al.
